Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Dark Blue, Light Blue, Purple, Pink, White, and Rose Red. Durable Material: Our crepe paper is of high quality, offering excellent thickness for increased strength - no flimsy paper that tears easily. Accurate Color: The colors are true to the visuals, beautiful and rich in color. These rainbow crepe paper streamers are ideal for adding a pop of color to any party.
